programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: UK. A weary assassin hires a gangster's cocky stepson as his driver to show him the ropes. But a stunning woman upsets the applecart after a hit in this witty caper.

programme.title: Death Defying Acts
programme.desc: Houdini starts an affair with a psychic out to con the famous escapologist. As the stakes get higher, it soon becomes a question of who is out-conning who.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipino immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home, securing a better future for her family, but a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything.

programme.title: Last Days In The Desert
programme.desc: An imagined chapter from Jesus' forty days of fasting and praying in the desert. On his way out of the wilderness, Jesus struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: A young Irish woman travels to 1950s Brooklyn and falls in love with her new life, until a family tragedy forces her to choose between the two countries and the people in them.

programme.title: Six Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Seventeen days before WWII, a teacher must try to exonerate himself in time to save the hearts and minds of his students from the grip of Hitler.

programme.title: A Little Chaos
programme.desc: This period drama tells the tale of two landscape artists who become romantically involved while constructing the grand gardens at King Louis XIV's palace at Versailles.

programme.desc: Painstakingly assembled over the last six years, British film icon Michael Caine tells the vivid and inspiring story of his personal journey through 1960s London.

programme.desc: Global affairs are juggled with the all-too-human side of one of history's iconic leaders Franklin D. Roosevelt as he hosts the English royals for an unforgettable weekend in upstate NY.

programme.title: Summerland
programme.desc: During World War II, an Englishwoman opens her heart to an evacuee after initially resolving to be rid of him in this moving journey of womanhood, love and friendship.

programme.title: Beast
programme.desc: Moll is stifled by her surroundings, but too beholden to her family to break away. When she meets Pascal, a free-spirited stranger, a whole new world opens up to her.

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: An aged, retired Sherlock Holmes deals with early dementia as he tries to remember both his final case and a mysterious woman whose memory haunts him.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The captivating, true story of a man who discovers the Japanese officer who tortured him during the war is still alive, and sets out to confront him.

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: This action adventure documents the true story of the elite 30 Commando unit, formed during World War II by the man who would later become novelist Ian Fleming, and their risky mission in Norway.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a body falls from the 59th Street Bridge, the CSI team finds a compass near the body pointing east, and realises it's the third victim of the Compass Killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team lose the Compass Killer at the World's Fair site, and they soon discover through the use of astronomy and sunrises that it's only a matter of time before he targets the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mummified remains are found in a booby-trapped Manhattan penthouse that has been closed off for more than 80 years, and Mac and Stella race against time to find the people who discovered the body.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A big rig accident results in the discovery of an interstate trucking ring that specialises in human cargo and black market organ harvesting, and sets off a race against time to save a hostage.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a body falls from the 59th Street Bridge, the CSI team finds a compass near the body pointing east, and realises it's the third victim of the Compass Killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSI uncovers a plot to collect millions of dollars in life insurance after a reformed homeless man is found dead in an alley.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder trial is delayed and the suspect is released on bail after Stella discovers that the district attorney in the case tampered with the crime scene for personal gain.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a star quarterback of the Lingerie Football League is found murdered in the locker room hot tub with traces of lidocaine in her system, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is found in Central Park, drained of blood and missing part of her ear, the CSIs jump start an investigation that takes them into the dark and mysterious subculture of vampirism.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team tries to figure out who rigged a race car to go up in flames and leave its legendary driver in critical condition.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team must unravel the series of events from a wild night for a group of friends, a night which ended in four dead bodies, and a fifth person wandering the streets covered in blood and wielding an axe.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team discovers that a double homicide is related to an investigation by a pair of journalist bloggers into fraud by a company that makes gold bullion.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Sid rules the death of a woman whose twin brother disappeared 15 years ago a suicide, but Stella is convinced that he is wrong and sets out to prove it.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Dr Hawkes is trapped in a cell block during a security breach orchestrated by a familiar face from CSI's past, and the only person who can help him get to safety is the death row inmate who murdered his sister.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team uncovers an underground fighting league after they discover the body of a retired boxer buried under concrete at a construction site.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A teen is critically injured after being shot in an alleyway. The victim's younger brother witnessed the crime, but he cannot give an accurate description of the incident and shooter to the police.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder is connected to suspicious behaviour that Mac spies from his apartment while recovering from an injury, and his ex-girlfriend Peyton Driscoll may be connected to the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Shane Casey is captured by police but soon escapes. He then leaves clues for the crime lab encrypted in dollar bills that suggest that Danny is his next target.

programme.title: Murder 360
programme.desc: True crime from every angle, diving deep into motive, method and psychology with expert analysis, intimate interviews and gripping cases.

programme.title: Ed Gein: Original Psycho
programme.desc: A two-part series bringing to life one of history's most disturbing killers, Ed Gein, the man whose crimes inspired 'Psycho', 'The Texas Chainsaw Massacre', and 'The Silence of the Lambs'.

programme.title: Monster In The Morgue
programme.desc: For three decades, the families of Wendy Knell and Caroline Pierce live in fear, as the man responsible for the 1987 killings that come to be known as 'The Bedsit Murders' evade capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a human skeleton was discovered and investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, much less who killed her.

programme.title: Bizarre Murders
programme.desc: A quiet, average teenager with an interest in the occult brutally murders his elderly neighbour in a ritualistic attempt to become an immortal vampire.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A 70-year-old, retired veteran is found dead on his boat after a bad sea storm. Investigators later discover he was killed during an attempted robbery after winning $400 in Keno.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person, and an abandoned truck lead police to where they believe a murder took place. The evidence is overwhelming, and investigators are sure they have the killer.

programme.title: City Confidential
programme.desc: Three employees are gunned down inside one of Washington, DC's favourite brunch spots. Residents are gripped with fear as detectives hunt for the shooter, finding a group of assassins with a vendetta.

programme.title: Killer Cases
programme.desc: Police receive a frantic 911 call about a woman who witnessed a murder. But during her interrogation, detectives begin to wonder, was she the victim, or was she the killer?

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Following the 35-year investigation and forensic advances that identify Rosa's savage killer.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a volatile suspect. A restaurant-goer gets combative after his card is declined. A suspect is taken down at the scene of a distress call. A bystander is struck by a DUI driver.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A boyfriend steps in to prevent his girlfriend's arrest. Officers rescue a kitten seeking refuge in a dangerous spot. A man's claim of driving a stolen truck for one day is proven incorrect.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: A veteran cop who joins forces with an upstart lawman to take down prohibition gangster Al Capone.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: The Meaning of Life
programme.desc: The Monty Python team tackle this weighty subject in a series of sketches involving body parts, religion, the wonders of war, the miracle of birth, and a preview of what awaits in heaven.

programme.desc: Join an African prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, as it's time for him to find a princess.

programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter. It's the final chapter in the time-travelling comedy series.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: What would you do if you knew that in a few days a comet would collide with Earth and all humanity could be annihilated? The countdown to doomsday is underway.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In a future world devastated by disease, a convict is sent back in time to gather information about the man-made virus that wiped out most of the human population.

programme.title: Carlito's Way
programme.desc: An ex-con sprung from prison stuns the New York underworld by vowing to go straight from a history of violence, but his plans are undermined by misguided loyalties and an outmoded code of honour.

programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Core Kyoto
programme.desc: Fermenting soybeans, Koji mold, and salt produces richly flavored, aromatic Miso. Types vary by region, but the white, mellow Miso first made 1000 years ago in the imperial court is favored in Kyoto.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.desc: Roughly 90% of Japan's plastic models are made in Shizuoka, an area whose manufacturing roots date back to shogun Tokugawa Ieyasu. We explore the latest developments for Japan's superb plastic models.

programme.desc: At dusk in summer, a woman is absorbed in reading a letter. This chic lady is actually an advertisement model for Mitsui Echigoya, one of the top kimono fabric stores in Edo.

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: More than a decade after the Great East Japan Earthquake, two women who lost their daughters ask a painter to portray them as grown ups. Will the portraits bring solace to the bereaved families?

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Activate Your Japanese
programme.desc: Learn how to make the most of your Japanese skills. Watch our drama that features useful communication strategies, our snappy videos about onomatopoeia, and our documentaries on "senpai" in Japan.

programme.title: BOSAI: Science that Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: Japan has a long history of natural disasters. BOSAI explores how to overcome them and save lives with the power of science.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: From prevention to cure! The groundbreaking world of Japanese medical technology and healthcare. For your healthy lifestyle, this program shows tips of superfoods and easy exercises.

programme.title: NHK News 7
programme.desc: NEWS 7 is NHK's flagship domestic evening news program, bringing you the latest from our Tokyo studio. It's presented with English audio on NHK World for our international viewers.

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programme.desc: Two-meter-long dinosaurs terrorizing downtown Bangkok? Not exactly! Water monitors are indeed big but pose no threat if left alone. Join us as we discover how they've adapted to their "urban kingdom"!

programme.title: Time-lapse Journey
programme.desc: Mt. Fuji, the tallest mountain in Japan, has many faces. See the beauty of these different Fujis through time-lapse photography.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Direct and in-depth. Interviews exploring the minds and motivations of the leaders, visionaries, artists and entrepreneurs who are changing our world.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history and culture. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.desc: #15 To the monkey hot spring, please. / To tell a taxi driver where you want to go, just say the destination and "made onegai-shimasu."

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: The story of a teenager who struggles through school and family life by escaping into a fantasy world of magic and monsters.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: The flesh-eating undead have wiped out every last vestige of the civilised world. Deep underground, a group of scientists and soldiers work to find a cure for the unstoppable plague.

programme.title: Terrifier
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Tara Heyes finds herself as the obsession of a sadistic murderer known as Art the Clown.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: Lizzy is settling a remote stretch of land on the 19th-century American frontier, when she begins to sense a sinister presence that seems to be borne of the land itself.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

programme.title: Open Your Eyes
programme.desc: A very handsome gentleman finds the love of his life, but suffers an accident and needs to have his face reconstructed through surgery after being severely disfigured.

programme.title: The House That Jack Built
programme.desc: USA in the 1970s. We follow the highly intelligent Jack over a span of 12 years and are introduced to the murders that define his development as a serial killer.

programme.title: Black Death
programme.desc: Set during the time of the first outbreak of bubonic plague in England, a young monk is given the task of learning the truth about reports of people being brought back to life in a small village.

programme.title: Synchronic
programme.desc: Two New Orleans paramedics' lives are ripped apart after they encounter a series of horrific deaths linked to a designer drug with bizarre, other-worldly effects.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: An enthusiastic young adventurer follows his dreams into the Amazon jungle with two friends and a guide with a mysterious past.

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: In an America ravaged by atomic warfare, nomads spend their days scavenging for scrap. That's how an ex-soldier acquires spare android parts, which turn into a robot programmed to destroy humans.

programme.title: A Bittersweet Life
programme.desc: A gangster starts a violent feud after he refuses to kill his boss's cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: Hellraiser
programme.desc: A horrifying, living-dead version of Julia's husband appears and coerces her to seduce and kill men so that he can feed on their blood to regain his flesh.

programme.title: Hellraiser
programme.desc: A horrifying, living-dead version of Julia's husband appears and coerces her to seduce and kill men so that he can feed on their blood to regain his flesh.

programme.title: Sympathy For The Devil
programme.desc: After being forced to drive a mysterious passenger at gunpoint, a man finds himself in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse where it becomes clear that not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Re-Animator
programme.desc: A medical student (Jeffrey Combs) brings his headless professor back from the dead with a special serum.

programme.title: Bride of Re-Animator
programme.desc: A mad doctor and his accomplice return to the scene of a zombie massacre to continue their bodybuilding experiments.

programme.title: Beyond Re-Animator
programme.desc: The imprisoned Dr West continues his gruesome experiments with the aid of the new jailhouse physician.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: Christian, a millionaire heir, meets Sigrid, a young student, on a dating app. They hit it off, but there's only one problem: Christian lives with Frank, a man who dresses up and constantly acts like a dog.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, months after the first film, Ming suspects a superintendent is a triad mole, while years earlier, Yan undertakes his first mission. (Subtitles).

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Nomi Malone has what it takes to make it as a Las Vegas showgirl - what she doesn't have is a way in. To survive, she accepts the only job available, lap dancing at a seedy club.

programme.title: Vesper
programme.desc: Struggling to survive with her father after the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, 13-year-old Vesper must use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the future.

programme.title: The Chaser
programme.desc: A cop investigates the disappearance of several call girls he pimps out.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: After a shooting incident at the North-South Korean border DMZ leaves two North Korean soldiers dead, a neutral Swiss and Swedish team investigates what actually happened.

programme.title: Corrective Measures
programme.desc: When a powerless new inmate arrives at a prison for supervillains, he must choose his friends wisely, or become a pawn in the deadly game between the Warden and The Lobe.

programme.title: Cops vs Thugs
programme.desc: A dirty cop is forced to choose between the police and his yakuza buddies when a new boss arrives in his precinct.

programme.title: God is a Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: God is a Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: A Tale of Two Sisters
programme.desc: On returning home from a mental health facility, two sisters find that, along with their stepmother, they have to find a way to deal with their late mother's ghost who begins to haunt them.

programme.title: Color Out Of Space
programme.desc: A family's retreat to rural life quickly crumbles when a meteorite crashes into their front yard. They attempt to battle a nebulous entity that they can barely understand.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three Kung Fu prodigies have grown into washed-up, middle-aged men. But when their master is murdered, they must juggle their dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge his death.

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: District B13
programme.desc: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

programme.title: You Were Never Really Here
programme.desc: Joe is a hired gun who rescues trafficked girls, using brutal methods against those responsible.

programme.title: I Saw The Devil
programme.desc: The line between good and evil begins to blur when a special agent goes on the hunt for a serial killer who brutally murdered his pregnant fiancee.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: An employee of a floral shop hangs himself when a colleague goes to his apartment to investigate his absence from work.

programme.title: Wasabi
programme.desc: The death of a ex-lover puts a French cop on a collision course with the Yakuza and the daughter he never knew he had.

programme.title: Hokuriku Proxy War
programme.desc: A Yakuza group from Osaka with dreams of national dominance moves into the snowy Hokuriku region, sparking a bloody turf war with local gangs.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Sole-survivor of a plane crash, and stranded deep within the Arctic Circle, Overgard is waiting to be rescued, when a sudden turn of events finds him no longer on his own.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Sole-survivor of a plane crash, and stranded deep within the Arctic Circle, Overgard is waiting to be rescued, when a sudden turn of events finds him no longer on his own.

programme.title: Lords of Chaos
programme.desc: The origins of Norwegian Black Metal and a group of young men with a flair for publicity, church-burning and murder.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: A bonding weekend goes horribly wrong for seven colleagues who find themselves facing the chop when they are sabotaged by a deadly enemy. Only the smartest will survive this brutal office outing.

programme.title: Apex
programme.desc: A group of elite hunters pay to hunt down a man on a deserted island, only to find themselves becoming the prey.

programme.title: Come To Daddy
programme.desc: Norval, a privileged man-child travels to the beautiful and remote cabin of his estranged father, in order to reconnect with him as he hasn't seen him in 30 years.

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: A bedridden stuntman entrances a little girl with tales of exotic heroes. As his health reaches the point of peril so does the story he's telling, with dramatic consequences. An epic fantasy.

programme.title: Thesis
programme.desc: A Spanish film student (Ana Torrent) finds a videotape showing the torture and murder of a missing coed.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Quest for Fire
programme.desc: A prehistoric Cro-Magnon tribe depends on an ever-burning source of fire, which eventually extinguishes. Lacking the knowledge of how to start a new one, the tribe sends three warriors on a quest.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: Veronica meets a James Dean-type newcomer who suggests they kill off the popular kids and end the cruel, unfair treatment the girls impose on unpopular kids at school.

programme.title: Suspiria
programme.desc: A girl enrols in an upmarket ballet academy, only to realise that the school is a front for something much more sinister and supernatural.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: Audition
programme.desc: A widower accepts his friend's offer to audition girls in order to search for his new wife. However, the girl he likes does not appear to be the one she claims to be.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: When dangerous criminals on a cargo ship are transported from the Phillipines to South Korea, they unleash a sinister force after an escape attempt leads to a riot. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Demonic Toys: Personal Demons
programme.desc: A group of people on a world wide search for oddities find themselves trapped in a nine hundred year old Italian castle when they accidently unleash the Demonic Toys.

programme.title: Oasis

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Trusting in Claire's knowledge of 'history', Jamie leads the Jacobite army into a critical battle with British opposition near the town of Preston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and the Highlanders are sent north after the Jacobite leaders decide to halt their march on London. A band of redcoats makes trouble for the Scots, leading to a most unexpected reunion for Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Jamie puts all of his efforts into turning the Jacobite army away from the impending slaughter at Culloden Moor, Claire attempts to comfort the sick Alex Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Flashing forward to 1968, Claire reveals the truth about her parentage to her daughter. Back in the 18th century, the day of the Battle of Culloden has arrived.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After living through the Battle of Culloden, Jamie is at the mercy of British victors, until his past provides his only hope of survival. Meanwhile, Claire attempts to adjust to life in 1940s Boston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie leads a lonely life until Lallybroch is threatened by redcoats pursing the elusive Jacobite traitor. In Boston, Claire and Frank struggle to co-exist in a marriage haunted by the ghost of Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: In prison, Jamie discovers that an old foe has become the warden and has the power to make his life hell. Claire and Frank both put their best foot forward in marriage.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While serving as a groomsman at Helwater, Jamie is pulled into the intrigue of a British family. In 1968, Claire, Brianna and Roger struggle to trace Jamie's whereabouts.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna grapples with life-changing revelations and Claire must help her come to terms with the fact that she is her father's daughter. Roger brings news that forces Claire and Brianna to face a choice.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After decades apart, Jamie and Claire finally reunite and rekindle their emotional and physical bonds, but Jamie's new business dealings jeopardise the couple's hopes for a simple life together.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire follows her conscience as a surgeon, even though it could put her and Jamie's lives at risk. Jamie attempts to evade the reach of the Crown as its representative closes in on his illegal dealings.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire returns to Lallybroch with Jamie, where she does not receive quite the reception she was expecting. Unbeknown to her, Jamie's made some choices in their time apart which come back to haunt them.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie leave Scotland, sailing to the West Indies on an urgent quest. When the superstitious crew looks for someone to blame after a string of bad luck, rescue comes from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire races to discover the source of an epidemic aboard a disease-stricken ship. Jamie locks horns with Captain Raines. Fergus finds himself torn between loyalty and love.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After a leap of faith, Claire washes up on an island where survival is her only option. Navigating treacherous waters cripples the Artemis, so Jamie devises a joyful moment for his crew in the midst of setbacks.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Artemis finally reaches Jamaica, bringing Jamie and Claire closer to their goal. During a ball on the island, the Fraser's encounter old allies and former adversaries who threaten to derail their mission.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is forced to play a game of cat and mouse with an old adversary as she searches for Young Ian. The Frasers race through the jungles of Jamaica to prevent the unthinkable.

programme.title: Outlander

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire search for a place to call home. Meanwhile, in the 20th-century, Brianna and Roger's romance heats up and then fizzles during a road trip that winds up highlighting their differences.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Having been led by providence to Fraser's Ridge, Jamie, Claire and Young Ian begin to build a home in the Blue Ridge Mountains. In the 20th century, Roger tries to reconnect with Brianna.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire's medical expertise proves invaluable, but she begins to fear for her life when tragedy strikes her patients' household. Jamie and Young Ian travel to a nearby town to recruit settlers for Fraser's Ridge.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire are surprised when Lord John Grey drops in on Fraser's Ridge with an unexpected companion; when Grey takes ill, Claire must reconcile her personal feelings with her duties as a doctor.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna follows in her mother's footsteps and travels through the stones back in time to 18th-century Scotland, where she struggles to make her way to the Colonies to find her parents.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Roger's diligent search for Brianna pays off when he finds her in Wilmington, but their romantic reunion comes to an abrupt halt when she discovers pertinent information that he intentionally kept from her.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Brianna struggles to compartmentalise the trauma she's suffered in the wake of the tragedy that befell her in Wilmington, she refocuses on finding her parents.

programme.desc: Jamie, Claire and Young Ian embark on a long, uncertain journey to rescue Roger, while Brianna forges a friendship with one of Jamie's old friends as she fends off Aunt Jocasta's attempts to find a husband.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna confronts a violent figure from her past in an attempt to cope with her trauma. Roger befriends a fellow captive and endeavours to escape the Mohawk village.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie, Claire and Young Ian's attempt to rescue Roger from his Mohawk captors goes awry when a ghost from Claire's past lays waste to their plan. Brianna worries Claire, Jamie and Roger might not return.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Following celebrations in honour of Brianna and Roger's wedding, Governor Tryon reminds Jamie of his obligation to hunt down and kill Murtagh Fitzgibbons.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Jamie continues to hunt Murtagh with the aid of the zealous Lieutenant Hamilton Knox, he's forced to consider whether or not he's on the right side of history.

programme.desc: The growing Regulator threat forces Jamie, Claire and Roger to embark on a mission to raise a militia.

programme.desc: A dysentery epidemic spreads on the Ridge, and Claire falls deathly ill. She is almost recovered when the Christies arrive and drop a bombshell.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Go back to where it all started. In the first episode of the series, 10 bakers tackle three increasingly difficult challenges to test their cake-making ability.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: In this episode, Mel and Sue take the eight passionate home bakers who made it through to Scone Palace to make biscuits and teatime treats.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's week three and the six remaining bakers are making bread in Kent. If they found cakes and biscuits challenging, it's bread that's considered the real test of a baker's mettle.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining five bakers have travelled to Bakewell in Derbyshire. The bakers are reinventing an often neglected British classic - the pudding.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the penultimate round, and as the travelling marquee pitches up in the Cornish village of Mousehole, it's time for the bakers to get to grips with the most difficult of all baking skills: pastry.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the final week of Great British Bake Off and the three remaining bakers are preparing for a tea party in Fulham Palace. Which of the bakers will best cope with the pressure and will be crowned?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off S1 Revisited
programme.desc: This program reflects on the highlights from season one. Catching up with the bakers to hear the highs and lows of their journey, where are they now and how their lives changed.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: Easter
programme.desc: Join Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood as they showcase some of their favourite Easter recipes. In a step-by-step guide, Mary and Paul will show you how to make the classics, including hot cross buns and simnel cake.

programme.desc: It's week two in the contest to find Britain's best amateur baker. Last time, they inadvertently served an upside-down cake on a floor tile. This time, the amateur bakers' pastry skills are scrutinised as they tackle tarts.

programme.desc: The bakers are challenged to create a freeform flavoured loaf, testing their bread-making skills, with one contestant eliminated.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers create tiered cakes, tarts, and bread for challenges, with the remaining eight focusing on biscuit-making skills.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers face gruelling pie challenges over two days, trying to avoid soggy bottoms as the competition narrows down.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers face their biggest challenge yet. In the all-lady quarterfinal, the remaining five have to impress with their dessert skills. One will be crowned star baker and for one the journey will end.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the semifinal, and the bakers must successfully demonstrate a variety of new and different skills. The four remaining contestants begin by making a baked, layered, mousse cake.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: In the grand finale, the contestants bake for the street party, where the winner will be revealed. Only one of these three home bakers will be crowned champion.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers attempt to make flatbread. They also attempt Paul's recipe for the notoriously difficult eight-strand plaited loaf. Who will impress and be named star baker and who will be sent home?

programme.desc: The pressure is on for the remaining 10 bakers as they tackle their tartes tartin. They are then asked to re-create Mary's treacle tart, and it turns out to be tougher than it looks.

programme.desc: The bakers face three challenges: an array of rich tortes, creme caramel and meringue. Who will take away the crown?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers turn their attention to pies; they must master a perfect Wellington; none of the bakers has used a pastry dolly before and it proves the downfall of many.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers face a queen of puddings with a recipe direct from the archives of Mary Berry.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Facing 3 sweet dough challenges, the bakers create their Signature regional buns, and in a final bid to hang on to their place the bakers produce an enriched dough loaf fit for a celebration.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Time and temperature work against the bakers to make six perfectly tempered chocolate. The final challenge tests not only the quality of the bake, but how well it works as a building material.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Four bakers are left vying for a place in the final. The weight of the occasion is getting to the most unflappable of the bakers as they frantically work against the clock to deliver petits fours.

programme.desc: Three bakers have made it to the final. They will have to bake first-rate fondant fancies to impress Paul and Mary. It all comes down to their final showstopper: creating a chiffon sponge. Who will be the winner?

programme.desc: Thirteen contestants battle it out to be named Britain's best amateur baker, facing tasks from judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood. They must make a sandwich cake, before having to follow Mary's recipe for angel food cake.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 12 remaining contenders face three tasks designed to test their bread-making skills, beginning by making 36 perfect bread sticks. For the technical challenge, they must prepare a batch of English muffins.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess the 11 remaining contestants' dessert-making skills, beginning with a signature trifle combining biscuit, cake, jelly or custard in distinct layers.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess how the contestants cope with making pies. They begin with signature double-crusted fruit pies, make custard tarts, and finish by creating pies made with filo pastry.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess how the remaining contestants cope with cooking biscuits and traybakes. The bakers construct biscuit towers, but who will crumble under the pressure of the showstopper?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The contestants face three tasks involving sweet dough and begin by making signature tea loaves, presenting to judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood set the remaining contestants three tasks involving pastry, first asking them to make signature suet puddings. For Mary's Technical challenge, they must prepare eight delicate choux buns.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the quarterfinal, and Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood test how the remaining contestants cope with unconventional flours and desserts, beginning by baking a signature loaf using non-traditional flours.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The four semifinalists face three French challenges, beginning by preparing three types of savoury canapes in just two-and-a-half hours. In the Technical challenge they each have to make a Charlotte royale.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The final 3 are challenged to make a savoury pie with a creative design, 12 perfectly shaped pretzels and a 3 tiered wedding cake.

programme.desc: The judges take on the same challenges as the bakers, showing what they'd do in their place. Mary and Paul share tips and tricks for perfect bakes at home.

programme.desc: In the second baking masterclass, the Bake Off judges walk us through some of the signature, technical and showstopper challenges from Dessert and Pie weeks.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: We welcome the tent's youngest-ever baker, and the oldest. Thirty challenges, 12 brand-new bakers, two judges, and two presenters, but there can only be one winner. On your marks, get set, bake.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Serving up signature savoury biscuits, the bakers must push themselves on flavour to create biscuits that go well with a cheese course. In the Technical challenge, Mary sets the bakers her recipe for Florentines.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining 10 bakers get ready to brave bread. Knowing that Paul will be watching their every move, the bakers must bake 12 perfect rye bread rolls, shaped in any way they like.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood up the ante and, for the first time, we see how the bakers cope with multi-tasking across several baking skills. For the Technical challenge, Mary sets the bakers her tiramisu cake.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Starting with a signature custard tart that gives more than one of them a wobble, the bakers must make sweet custard tarts of their own invention, ranging from rhubarb and custard to chocolate and coconut.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Mary sets the bakers their most demanding Technical challenge: a Swedish princess torte. With 24 different stages and only two-and-a-quarter hours to do it in, the bakers have their work cut out for them.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers are asked to make signature savoury parcels, ranging from pasties to wellingtons and samosas. The bakers must make show stopping eclairs, which they hope will secure them a place in the quarter finals.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the quarterfinals and only five bakers remain. Asked to make sweet fruit loaves for their Signature challenge, the bakers must work with soft dough to create works of art for Paul and Mary to critique.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's semifinal time and the tension is palpable as the bakers take up the mantle of Patisserie Week. The semifinalists have to make signature baklava with the crisp, flaky layers of perfectly pulled filo pastry.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The final three bakers have fought their way through 27 baking challenges and now just three challenges lie between them and the trophy. Who will be crowned winner?

programme.title: Great British Bake Off Revisit S5
programme.desc: Catch up with the bakers from series five. Look back at the golden moments, and recurring nightmares, of the bakers dozen as they revisit their time in the tent and share their memories.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: Masterclass
programme.desc: Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood make the signature, showstopper challenges they set the bakers in the first couple of weeks of the series and show us what they would have done had the roles been reversed in the tent.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: Masterclass
programme.desc: Paul shows his saucy side with chocolate volcano fondant puds and Mary finishes off with her Neapolitan baked Alaska.

programme.title: Drop the Bass
